templates.flux_egg: Translucent {material} egg, soft inner glow revealing vague {shape} silhouette inside, {color} subsurface scattering, smooth shell surface, studio lighting, white background, 8k, MEOKSTYLE
templates.flux_cracking: Translucent {material} egg with glowing {crack_pattern} cracks, bright {color} light emanating from fractures, inner {shape} visible through shell, studio lighting, 8k, MEOKSTYLE
templates.flux_hatching: Juvenile {material} {shape} character emerging from shattered translucent shell, fresh unfired surface, strong inner glow, {color} subsurface scattering, big eyes, small body, white background, 8k, MEOKSTYLE
templates.flux_growing: Adolescent {material} {shape} character, developing {features}, {color} surface with emerging texture, semi-translucent thin parts, white background, 8k, MEOKSTYLE
templates.flux_mature: Adult {material} {shape} character, fully developed {features}, rich {color} surface, mature patina, subtle translucency at edges, regal pose, white background, 8k, MEOKSTYLE
templates.flux_sovereign: Transcendent {material} {shape} character, floating fragments held by energy, chromatic iridescence, {color} aura, halo of light, power emanating, white background, 8k, MEOKSTYLE
templates.flux_dragon: {dragon_material} dragon, {dragon_shape}, {dragon_color} scales/membranes, {archetype_features}, studio lighting, white background, 8k, MEOKSTYLE
templates.trellis: Clean mesh, water-tight, low-poly efficient, {material} material properties, game-ready topology
templates.animation_idle: Gentle breathing idle loop, subtle float, 2-second seamless cycle, {archetype_behavior}
templates.animation_egg: Gentle rocking, pulsing internal glow, subtle surface shimmer, 3-second cycle
